Compliance.description: Regulated by CMS under Medical Schemes Act; FSP 18427; GCR AA- rating affirmed 2026 with stable outlook; no major violations reported.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Very low ratings: HelloPeter 1.27/5 (Trustindex 2.5, 225 recent reviews), Google reviews 1.9/5 (237 reviews); overwhelmingly negative feedback.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing for hospital-focused plans with savings options; good entry-level value but co-pays, network limits reduce perceived value; flexible customization.

Innovation.description: Member app with claims tracking, authorizations, chronic mgmt, real-time notifications; customizable plans, D2D+ benefits; Family Room portal; low app ratings (1.5/5 iOS).

Customer Support.description: AI agent Naledi, WhatsApp, phone (85% calls answered in 20s, 88% resolution); complaints highlight unhelpful call centers, delays, poor response quality.

Accessibility & Security.description: Member app available with biometric login, Family Room portal; POPIA compliance assumed as regulated scheme; low app ratings indicate usability issues but no security breaches reported.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From R1,155/mo FlexiFED Savvy principal (2026); up to R19,393 Maxima PLUS

socialSentiment.summary: Strongly negative on HelloPeter/Google (1.3-1.9/5); complaints dominate claims/service; some positives on coverage.
